UT Networked Systems People Projects Publications Contact Github Twitter

The UTNS research group at the University of Texas at Austin works on foundational systems and networking problems that arise in supporting big data analytics, distributed machine learning, and large-scale distributed applications. Our work explores both theoretical underpinnings and system design/implementation, and builds on ideas from adjacent areas such as game theory, optimization, and formal methods.

News

[May 2026] Yeonju Ro has been recognized as an MLCommons ML and Systems Rising Star!
[May 2026] PacketExpress was accepted at SIGCOMM 2026!
[Mar 2026] Mimesys was accepted at OSDI 2026!
[Dec 2025] SMEC, UNUM, Galileo, Syntra, and Symphony were accepted at NSDI 2026!
[Oct 2025] Rohit Dwivedula, Haoyu Li, and Xiao Zhang won the Amazon AI PhD Fellowship!
[Sep 2025] PolicySmith was accepted at the HotNets 2025!
[Aug 2025] Canopy was accepted at EuroSys 2026!
[Aug 2025] TraceLLM was accepted at EMNLP 2025!
[Jul 2025] Daehyeok Kim received the NSF CAREER Award!
[Jun 2025] ConfigBot was accepted at IROS 2025!

Featured publications

PacketExpress: Fully Exploiting Large MTUs for Internet Traffic in Private Networks Junghan Yoon, Youngmin Choi, Juyoung Park, Changhoon Kim, Daehyeok Kim, KyoungSoo Park. SIGCOMM, 2026. Mimesys: Generating Realistic Executable Testing Environments from Resource Usage Traces Donghyun Kim, Zichao Hu, Joydeep Biswas, Aditya Akella, Daehyeok Kim. OSDI, 2026. UNUM: A New Framework for Network Control Jiayi Chen, Nihal Sharma, Debajit Chakraborty, Saurabh Agarwal, Jeffrey Zhou, Aditya Akella, Sanjay Shakkottai. NSDI, 2026. Synthesizing a Provably Performant Joint Controller for Low-Latency Video Streaming Tony Pan, Anup Agarwal, Isil Dillig, Venkat Arun. NSDI, 2026. SYMPHONY: Improving Memory Management for LLM Inference Workloads Saurabh Agarwal, Bodun Hu, Anyong Mao, Aditya Akella, Shivaram Venkataraman. NSDI, 2026. Enabling SLO-Aware 5G Multi-Access Edge Computing with SMEC Xiao Zhang, Daehyeok Kim. NSDI, 2026. Towards Performance Robustness for Microservices Divyanshu Saxena, Gaurav Vipat, Jiaxin Lin, Jingbo Wang, Isil Dillig, Sanjay Shakkottai, Aditya Akella. NSDI, 2026.
